title: launaea aspleniifolia
intro: Launaea aspleniifolia, also known as Spiny Lettuce or Sphagneticola, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Launaea aspleniifolia include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating wounds, as well as providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Launaea aspleniifolia can be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
